headline: Cataract Surgery in KK Nagar, Chennai
subheadline: AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari offers painless, stitchless cataract surgery with premium IOL options. Evidence-based evaluation -- no unnecessary procedures.
metaDescription: Stitchless cataract surgery in KK Nagar, Chennai with AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari. Premium IOL options, painless procedure. Call or book online.
symptoms: Glare or halos around lights at night

processSteps.title: Comprehensive Evaluation
processSteps.description: Detailed eye exam to confirm the cataract and assess your overall eye health.

processSteps.title: Honest Discussion
processSteps.description: Dr. Rajeswari explains your results, IOL options, and timing -- no pressure to rush into surgery.

processSteps.title: The Procedure
processSteps.description: Stitchless, painless phacoemulsification surgery, typically with same-day discharge.
